mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND (parent_id = #{parentId} OR parent_id IS NULL) ORDER BY parent_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config (config_key, config_value, config_name, description, parent_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configName}, #{description}, #{parentId}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), config_name = VALUES(config_name), description = VALUES(description), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE system_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND ( (#{parentId} IS NOT NULL AND parent_id = #{parentId}) OR (#{parentId} IS NULL AND parent_id IS NULL) )
